rows.label: tlk43420341_03_msg0001
rows.name:
Lately, I tried tending
the potted trees, and it
was surprisingly interesting.

rows.label: tlk43420341_03_msg0002
rows.name:
Vandham's trees, the ones
he raised as a hobby,
caught my eye.

rows.label: tlk43420341_03_msg0003
rows.name:
It felt wrong to let them
wither, so I decided
to take over.

rows.label: tlk43420341_03_msg0004
rows.name:
Vandham was always good
at raising things, whether
people or trees.

rows.label: tlk43420341_03_msg0005
rows.name:
You too should work hard
to help grow this
Merc Group, all right?
